title: Super Awesome Skys
description: Super Awesome Skys is a resource pack that will make your game look amazing/better than what it does currently. It adds insanely detailed skys, with detailed clouds. Just put it over any pack and it should work perfectly!
body:
Super Awesome Skys is a resource pack that will make your game look amazing/better than what it does currently. It adds insanely detailed skys, with detailed clouds. Just put it over any pack and it should work perfectly!

It's extremely performance-friendly, as you can run this on some of the worst laptops and PCs and it can run smoothly! All skys are the same in all biomes. This has one the the best night sky packs (in my opinion) ever.

This pack will have all types of days, noon, sunset/sunrise, and a night sky. It makes your world seem more smooth and satisfying.

Credits to OwOCuddleMittens/OwOSnuggleBunny.
